title: Jack and the Beanstalk
author: Traditional
description: A poor boy named Jack sells his cow for magic beans. The beans grow into a huge beanstalk that reaches the clouds.

vocabularies.meaning: a very tall plant that grows very fast
a large building where kings and queens live
special powers that are not real
a yellow metal that is very valuable
a large bird like a duck
a farm animal that gives milk
to go up using your hands and feet

scenes.title: Introduction
scenes.narrator: Once upon a time, there was a poor boy named Jack. He lived with his mother. They had a cow. It was their only possession.

scenes.title: The Cow is Sold
scenes.narrator: One day, there was no food in the house. Jack's mother told him to sell the cow.

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: Jack, we have no money. Please sell the cow at the market.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: Yes, mother. I will go right now.

scenes.title: Magic Beans
scenes.narrator: On the way to the market, Jack met an old man.

dialogue.speaker: Old Man
dialogue.line: I will give you five magic beans for your cow.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: Magic beans? What do they do?

dialogue.speaker: Old Man
dialogue.line: Plant them tonight. You will see something amazing!

scenes.title: Mother is Angry
scenes.narrator: Jack went home. His mother was not happy.

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: You sold our cow for beans?! That is terrible!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: But mother, they are MAGIC beans!

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: There is no such thing as magic. Go to your room.

scenes.title: The Beanstalk Grows
scenes.narrator: Jack threw the beans on the ground and went to bed. But something amazing happened that night.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: What is that noise outside?

scenes.title: Climbing the Beanstalk
scenes.narrator: A huge beanstalk grew outside! It went all the way up to the clouds. Jack decided to climb it.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: I will climb to the top. I wonder what is up there.

scenes.title: The Giant's Castle
scenes.narrator: Jack climbed and climbed. At the top, he saw a giant castle.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: Wow! What a big castle!

scenes.title: The Giant's Wife
scenes.narrator: Jack went inside the castle. He met the giant's wife.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: Good morning! I am hungry. Can I have some food?

dialogue.speaker: Giant's Wife
dialogue.line: You must leave quickly! My husband is very dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: Please, just a little food.

dialogue.speaker: Giant
dialogue.line: Fee-fi-fo-fum! I smell a human!

dialogue.speaker: Giant's Wife
dialogue.line: Hurry! Hide in this pot!

scenes.title: The Giant Sleeps
scenes.narrator: The giant ate his lunch and fell asleep. When he was sleeping, Jack came out.

scenes.title: The Golden Eggs
scenes.narrator: Jack saw something shining. It was a goose that laid golden eggs!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: This goose lays golden eggs! I will take it home.

scenes.title: The Harp
scenes.narrator: Then Jack saw a beautiful harp. It was singing a sweet song.

dialogue.speaker: Harp
dialogue.line: Please help me! The giant is not nice to me.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: I will take you with me!

scenes.title: The Escape
scenes.narrator: Jack ran to the beanstalk. The giant woke up!

dialogue.speaker: Giant
dialogue.line: Fee-fi-fo-fum! Someone is stealing my things!

scenes.title: Cutting the Beanstalk
scenes.narrator: Jack climbed down fast. His mother helped him cut the beanstalk.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: Mother! Cut the beanstalk now!

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: What is happening? Okay, I will cut it!

scenes.title: Happy Ending
scenes.narrator: The beanstalk fell down. The giant could not come down. Jack and his mother were safe. They were rich now. They lived happily ever after.

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: We are rich! You are a hero, Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.line: I learned that sometimes what seems bad can turn into something good.
